summary: Tested P4 GPS+Foreman Stamp feature end-to-end. Backend: 5/5 pytest cases passing — POST /api/projects/{deal_id}/photos accepts and persists gps_lat/gps_lng/gps_accuracy/captured_at/stamped; backward-compat preserved (null GPS, captured_at auto-populates, stamped defaults false); GET returns the new fields; tag validation still 400s on bad tag; PATCH/DELETE/download/timeline.pdf still work. Frontend: /field route renders data-testid='field-stamp-toggle' ('Stamp ON' blue by default), data-testid='field-gps-indicator' updates within 5s of geolocation being granted, shows emerald '±8m' at accuracy<=25 and amber '±75m' at accuracy>25, toggle flips ON<->OFF with blue<->zinc styling, localStorage 'field_stamp_enabled' persists across reload. paintStamp call-site code-reviewed: invoked between drawImage and toBlob inside captureAndUpload (FieldCapture.jsx line 406), guards on stampEnabled, and metadata appended to FormData on upload (lines 425-431) as well as on queued offline flush (lines 272-276). Live stamp-preview overlay (data-testid='field-stamp-preview') only renders when (!cameraError && stampEnabled) which is the intended behaviour; headless browser reports 'Requested device not found' so preview not rendered there — code path verified by inspection.

minor.issue: Pre-existing fragility: any single un-decodable image blob in the deal aborts the whole PDF with 500 'broken data stream when reading image file'. Main agent's smoke-test photo (339-byte tiny synthetic JPEG, id=b5740239-09dd-4714-9221-f1b9033b9462 on deal b2f4b511) triggered this; I soft-deleted it to unblock testing. Consider wrapping each ImageReader call in a try/except inside progress_timeline_pdf.build_progress_timeline_pdf so one bad photo doesn't take down the whole timeline. Not a P4 regression.

action_items: (Optional, non-blocking) Harden progress_timeline_pdf.py to skip un-decodable photos instead of 500-ing the entire PDF — main agent's tiny synthetic seed JPEGs surface this fragility.
critical_code_review_comments: paintStamp correctly burns into pixels before canvas.toBlob — confirmed call-site in FieldCapture.jsx:406.
Both online upload (captureAndUpload) and offline-queue flush (flushQueue) append gps_lat/gps_lng/gps_accuracy/captured_at/stamped form fields — no metadata loss on offline-queued shots.
Stamp toggle persists to localStorage with key 'field_stamp_enabled' via dedicated useEffect — initial state reads from storage with default true.
GPS watcher uses watchPosition with enableHighAccuracy:true; cleared on unmount/dealId change — no orphan watchers.
Indicator color thresholds (<=25 emerald, >25 amber) match the spec verbatim.
seed_data_creation: Soft-deleted the corrupt 339-byte smoke-test photo (id=b5740239-09dd-4714-9221-f1b9033b9462) on deal b2f4b511 to unblock timeline.pdf rendering. Test photos created during pytest are cleaned up by the module-scope teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: /api/projects/{deal_id}/photos POST now accepts 5 new form fields (gps_lat/gps_lng/gps_accuracy/captured_at/stamped) — all optional. Tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_photo_gps_stamp.py and require REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var when invoked outside the standard pytest harness. Headless browsers will always show 'Requested device not found' for the camera; the stamp-preview overlay therefore only renders on real devices. Existing timeline.pdf endpoint is brittle if any photo blob is un-decodable — main agent may wish to add per-photo try/except.
